Package it.polimi.ingsw.network.server.model

Class PlayerBoard

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.network.server.model.PlayerBoard
public class PlayerBoard extends Object

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    PlayerBoard()
    create a new PlayerBoard with a DiningHall and am Hall and, at the end, set at zero the coins of the owner

  • Constructor Details

    • PlayerBoard

      public PlayerBoard()
      create a new PlayerBoard with a DiningHall and am Hall and, at the end, set at zero the coins of the owner

  • Method Details

    • addStudentsToHall

      public void addStudentsToHall(ArrayList<StudentColor> students)
      add students to the Hall
      Parameters:
      students - : students that must be added

    • removeStudentsFromHall

      public void removeStudentsFromHall(ArrayList<StudentColor> students)
      remove students from the Hall
      Parameters:
      students - students that must be deleted

    • addStudentsToDiningHall

      Parameters:
      students - students that must be added

      public boolean assignCoins()

    • removeStudents

      public int removeStudents(StudentColor color)
      remove a student from the DiningHall, , useful for the effect of the character card 12
      Parameters:
      color - : student that must be deleted
      Returns:
      the number of student successfully removed

    • moveStudents

      public void moveStudents(ArrayList<StudentColor> students)
      take a student from the Hall and move it in the DiningHall
      Parameters:
      students - students to move

    • switchStudents

      public void switchStudents(ArrayList<StudentColor> studentsToAddInH, ArrayList<StudentColor> studentsToAddInD)
      swaps two students between the Hall and the DiningHall, useful for character card 10
      Parameters:
      studentsToAddInH - students that must be added to the Hall
      studentsToAddInD - students that must be added to the DiningHall

    • useCoins

      public void useCoins(int price)
      spend coins, useful if the player need to buy a CharacterCard
      Parameters:
      price - price of the CharacterCard

    • checkCoins

      public int checkCoins(StudentColor color)
      check if there's any coin to take from a specified table
      Parameters:
      color - the color of the table to be checked
      Returns:
      coins that we have to take from the table
